texts.title: 短文一
paragraphs: 周末，明华和立强一起到公园去骑脚踏车。明华骑得很快，跟在后面的立强害怕地说：“明华，你骑慢点！”
明华不但不听立强的话，反而骑得更快了。结果，明华在转弯处从脚踏车上掉了下来。立强看了，立刻下车，跑过去对明华说：“明华，你没事吧？”明华听了，难为情地说：“对不起，我以后不会再骑得那么快了。”

audioTimestamps.text: 周末，明华和立强一起到公园去骑脚踏车。
audioTimestamps.english: On the weekend, Minghua and Liqiang went to the park together to ride bicycles.
Minghua rode very fast,

audioTimestamps.text: 跟在后面的立强害怕地说：
audioTimestamps.english: Liqiang, who was behind, said fearfully:
"Minghua, ride slower!"

audioTimestamps.text: 明华不但不听立强的话，
audioTimestamps.english: Minghua not only didn’t listen to Liqiang,
but instead rode even faster.
As a result, at the turn,
Minghua fell off the bicycle.
Liqiang saw this and immediately got off his bike,
ran over and said to Minghua:
"Minghua, are you OK?"
Minghua heard this and said embarrassedly:

audioTimestamps.text: “对不起，我以后不会再骑得那么快了。”
audioTimestamps.english: "Sorry, I won’t ride so fast again."

texts.title: 短文二
paragraphs: 风很骄傲，认为自己是世界上最强的。墙壁想给风一个教训，于是和风比强。风用尽全力地吹，把人、车子和树木都吹得东歪西倒。
当风正得意时，它发现墙壁竟然一动也不动。
“你……怎么那么强呀？”风气喘如牛地说。
“不，我不是最强的，人类比我还强。”墙壁说。
从此，风再也不敢自以为是了。

audioTimestamps.english: The wind was very proud,

audioTimestamps.text: 认为自己是世界上最强的。
audioTimestamps.english: thinking it was the strongest in the world.
The wall wanted to teach the wind a lesson,
so it competed with the wind in strength.
The wind blew with all its might,

audioTimestamps.text: 把人、车子和树木都吹得东歪西倒。
audioTimestamps.english: blowing people, cars and trees all over the place.
When the wind was feeling proud,

audioTimestamps.text: 它发现墙壁竟然一动也不动。
audioTimestamps.english: it discovered the wall hadn’t moved at all.
"You... how are you so strong?"
the wind said, panting like an ox.
"No, I’m not the strongest,
humans are even stronger than me."
the wall said.

audioTimestamps.text: 从此，风再也不敢自以为是了。
audioTimestamps.english: From then on, the wind never dared to be conceited again.

texts.title: 短文三
paragraphs: 甲和乙到国外旅行。晚上，当他们回到饭店时，服务生告诉他们电梯坏了，要给他们安排在楼下住一夜。他们不肯，决定走楼梯上十五层楼的客房。
当他们走到十四层楼时，甲忽然说：“这回麻烦了！”乙上气不接下气地说：“我累坏了，先回房间再说吧！”
甲结结巴巴地说：“我竟然……忘了……向服务员拿……房卡。”

audioTimestamps.english: Person A and Person B went travelling abroad.

audioTimestamps.text: 晚上，当他们回到饭店时，
audioTimestamps.english: At night, when they returned to the hotel,
the waiter told them
the elevator was broken,

audioTimestamps.text: 要给他们安排在楼下住一夜。
audioTimestamps.english: and offered to arrange for them to stay downstairs for the night.
They refused,

audioTimestamps.text: 决定走楼梯上十五层楼的客房。
audioTimestamps.english: and decided to take the stairs to the 15th floor room.

audioTimestamps.text: 当他们走到十四层楼时，
audioTimestamps.english: When they reached the 14th floor,
Person A suddenly said:
"We’re in trouble this time!"
Person B said, gasping for breath:
"I’m exhausted,
let’s get back to the room first!"
Person A stammered:
"I actually... forgot...
to get the room key card... from the staff."
